rationale: Educ. Code §47.005 governs allocation of available school fund money exceeding $300M to the tax reduction and excellence in education fund for tier one allotments. It does not address homestead exemption levels or their state-cost backfill; no operative text conflicts with raising the §11.13(b) exemption amount.
quote: Money considered part of the fund as described by Subsection (a) may be appropriated only to pay the cost of tier one allotments under Chapter 48.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal interaction possible via increased state cost of tier one allotments, but §47.005 neither sets nor references homestead exemption amounts.
